---
title: "Submit Question"
format: html
server: shiny
---

\
\## Submit Your Question\
```{r}
#| context: server
#| echo: false

library(shiny)

# UI
ui <- fluidPage(
  titlePanel("Submit Your Question"),
  
  wellPanel(
    textAreaInput("question", 
                  "Type your question:", 
                  rows = 5, 
                  width = "100%",
                  placeholder = "e.g., What is the future of AI in education?"),
    
    selectInput("question_country", 
                "Which country is this question about?",
                choices = c("Select a country" = "", 
                           "United States", "China", "Russia", 
                           "United Kingdom", "France", "Germany",
                           "Iran", "Israel", "Saudi Arabia", 
                           "Other")),
    
    actionButton("submit", "Submit Question", 
                 class = "btn-primary",
                 icon = icon("paper-plane"))
  ),
  
  verbatimTextOutput("status")
)

# Server
server <- function(input, output, session) {
  
  # Simulate AI topic classification
  classify_topic <- function(question) {
    question_lower <- tolower(question)
    
    if(grepl("ai|artificial intelligence|machine learning|deep learning", question_lower)) {
      return("Artificial Intelligence")
    } else if(grepl("data|database|sql|analytics", question_lower)) {
      return("Data Science")
    } else if(grepl("policy|law|regulation|government", question_lower)) {
      return("Policy & Regulation")
    } else if(grepl("economy|trade|market|business", question_lower)) {
      return("Economy & Trade")
    } else {
      return("General")
    }
  }
  
  # Simulate embedding generation (random vector for demo)
  get_embedding <- function(text) {
    set.seed(nchar(text))  # ШЁШ±Ш§ЫЊ ШЁШ§ШІШЄЩ€Щ„ЫЊШЇЩѕШ°ЫЊШ±ЫЊ
    runif(384)  # 384-dimensional embedding
  }
  
  # Cosine similarity
  cosine_similarity <- function(a, b) {
    sum(a * b) / (sqrt(sum(a^2)) * sqrt(sum(b^2)))
  }
  
  # Check for duplicate questions
  check_duplicate <- function(new_embedding, existing_embeddings) {
    if(length(existing_embeddings) == 0) return(FALSE)
    
    similarities <- sapply(existing_embeddings, function(e) {
      cosine_similarity(new_embedding, e)
    })
    
    return(max(similarities) > 0.85)
  }
  
  # Storage for existing embeddings (in memory for demo)
  existing_embeddings <- list()
  question_counter <- 0
  
  observeEvent(input$submit, {
    req(input$question)
    req(input$question_country)
    
    # Show processing modal
    showModal(modalDialog(
      title = "Processing",
      "Analyzing your question...",
      easyClose = FALSE,
      footer = NULL
    ))
    
    # Simulate processing delay
    Sys.sleep(1)
    
    # Classify topic
    topic <- classify_topic(input$question)
    
    # Generate embedding
    new_emb <- get_embedding(input$question)
    
    # Check for duplicates
    is_duplicate <- check_duplicate(new_emb, existing_embeddings)
    
    removeModal()
    
    if(is_duplicate) {
      showModal(modalDialog(
        title = "вљ пёЏ Similar Question Found",
        "A very similar question has already been submitted. Do you still want to submit?",
        footer = tagList(
          modalButton("Cancel"),
          actionButton("confirm_submit", "Submit Anyway", class = "btn-warning")
        )
      ))
    } else {
      # Save question
      question_counter <- question_counter + 1
      existing_embeddings[[question_counter]] <- new_emb
      
      output$status <- renderPrint({
        cat("вњ… Question submitted successfully!\n\n")
        cat("рџ“ќ Question:", input$question, "\n")
        cat("рџЊЌ Country:", input$question_country, "\n")
        cat("рџЏ·пёЏ  Topic:", topic, "\n")
        cat("рџ†” Question ID:", question_counter, "\n")
        cat("рџ“… Time:", Sys.time(), "\n")
        cat("\nYour question will be reviewed by the speaker.")
      })
      
      showNotification("Question submitted!", type = "success")
    }
  })
  
  observeEvent(input$confirm_submit, {
    removeModal()
    
    question_counter <- question_counter + 1
    existing_embeddings[[question_counter]] <- get_embedding(input$question)
    
    output$status <- renderPrint({
      cat("вњ… Question submitted (duplicate override)!\n\n")
      cat("рџ“ќ Question:", input$question, "\n")
      cat("рџЊЌ Country:", input$question_country, "\n")
      cat("рџ†” Question ID:", question_counter, "\n")
    })
    
    showNotification("Question submitted!", type = "success")
  })
}

# Run the app
shinyApp(ui, server)
